# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

imports:
- path: templates/network.jinja
- path: templates/cloudsql.jinja
- path: templates/storage.jinja
- path: templates/compute.jinja
- path: templates/loadbalancer.jinja

resources:
- name: app-network
  type: templates/network.jinja
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    networkName: app-vpc
    subnetName: app-subnet
    subnetCidr: 10.10.0.0/24
    allowedSshCidr: 0.0.0.0/0
    appPort: 8080

- name: app-storage
  type: templates/storage.jinja
  properties:
    bucketName: $(project)-app-assets
    location: US
    storageClass: STANDARD

- name: app-db
  type: templates/cloudsql.jinja
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    dbInstanceName: app-sql
    databaseVersion: POSTGRES_14
    tier: db-custom-1-3840
    diskSizeGb: 20
    availabilityType: ZONAL
    networkSelfLink: $(ref.app-network.networkSelfLink)
    databaseName: appdb
    dbUser: appuser
    dbPassword: change-me-secure-password

- name: app-compute
  type: templates/compute.jinja
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    zone: us-central1-a
    instanceTemplateName: app-template
    instanceGroupName: app-mig
    baseInstanceName: app
    machineType: e2-medium
    sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-12
    networkSelfLink: $(ref.app-network.networkSelfLink)
    subnetworkSelfLink: $(ref.app-network.subnetworkSelfLink)
    serviceAccountEmail: default
    startupScript: |
      #!/bin/bash
      apt-get update
      apt-get install -y nginx
      cat >/var/www/html/index.html <<'EOF'
      hello from app
      EOF
      cat >/etc/nginx/sites-available/default <<'EOF'
      server {
        listen 8080 default_server;
        listen [::]:8080 default_server;
        root /var/www/html;
        index index.html;
        location / {
          try_files $uri $uri/ =404;
        }
      }
      EOF
      systemctl restart nginx
    appPort: 8080
    targetSize: 2
    healthCheckPath: /
    healthCheckPort: 8080

- name: app-lb
  type: templates/loadbalancer.jinja
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    backendPort: 8080
    healthCheckPort: 8080
    healthCheckPath: /
    instanceGroupSelfLink: $(ref.app-compute.instanceGroupSelfLink)

outputs:
- name: bucketName
  value: $(ref.app-storage.bucketName)
- name: sqlConnectionName
  value: $(ref.app-db.connectionName)
- name: loadBalancerIp
  value: $(ref.app-lb.ipAddress)

---
{% set region = properties["region"] %}
{% set network = properties["networkName"] %}
{% set subnet = properties["subnetName"] %}
{% set cidr = properties["subnetCidr"] %}
{% set sshCidr = properties["allowedSshCidr"] %}
{% set appPort = properties["appPort"] %}

resources:
- name: {{ network }}
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    autoCreateSubnetworks: false

- name: {{ subnet }}
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    region: {{ region }}
    network: $(ref.{{ network }}.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: {{ cidr }}

- name: allow-ssh
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.{{ network }}.selfLink)
    sourceRanges:
    - {{ sshCidr }}
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "22"

- name: allow-app
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.{{ network }}.selfLink)
    sourceRanges:
    - 130.211.0.0/22
    - 35.191.0.0/16
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "{{ appPort }}"
    targetTags:
    - app-server

- name: allow-internal
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.{{ network }}.selfLink)
    sourceRanges:
    - 10.10.0.0/24
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
    - IPProtocol: udp
    - IPProtocol: icmp

outputs:
- name: networkSelfLink
  value: $(ref.{{ network }}.selfLink)
- name: subnetworkSelfLink
  value: $(ref.{{ subnet }}.selfLink)

---
{% set region = properties["region"] %}
{% set instance = properties["dbInstanceName"] %}
{% set dbVersion = properties["databaseVersion"] %}
{% set tier = properties["tier"] %}
{% set disk = properties["diskSizeGb"] %}
{% set availability = properties["availabilityType"] %}
{% set network = properties["networkSelfLink"] %}
{% set dbName = properties["databaseName"] %}
{% set dbUser = properties["dbUser"] %}
{% set dbPassword = properties["dbPassword"] %}

resources:
- name: {{ instance }}
  type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:instances
  properties:
    region: {{ region }}
    databaseVersion: {{ dbVersion }}
    settings:
      tier: {{ tier }}
      dataDiskSizeGb: {{ disk }}
      availabilityType: {{ availability }}
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: false
        privateNetwork: {{ network }}

- name: {{ instance }}-database
  type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:databases
  properties:
    name: {{ dbName }}
    instance: {{ instance }}
  metadata:
    dependsOn:
    - {{ instance }}

- name: {{ instance }}-user
  type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:users
  properties:
    name: {{ dbUser }}
    instance: {{ instance }}
    password: {{ dbPassword }}
  metadata:
    dependsOn:
    - {{ instance }}

outputs:
- name: connectionName
  value: $(ref.{{ instance }}.connectionName)

---
{% set bucket = properties["bucketName"] %}
{% set location = properties["location"] %}
{% set storageClass = properties["storageClass"] %}

resources:
- name: {{ bucket }}
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: {{ bucket }}
    location: {{ location }}
    storageClass: {{ storageClass }}
    versioning:
      enabled: false

outputs:
- name: bucketName
  value: {{ bucket }}

---
{% set region = properties["region"] %}
{% set zone = properties["zone"] %}
{% set tpl = properties["instanceTemplateName"] %}
{% set mig = properties["instanceGroupName"] %}
{% set base = properties["baseInstanceName"] %}
{% set machine = properties["machineType"] %}
{% set image = properties["sourceImage"] %}
{% set network = properties["networkSelfLink"] %}
{% set subnet = properties["subnetworkSelfLink"] %}
{% set sa = properties["serviceAccountEmail"] %}
{% set startup = properties["startupScript"] %}
{% set appPort = properties["appPort"] %}
{% set target = properties["targetSize"] %}

resources:
- name: {{ tpl }}
  type: compute.v1.instanceTemplate
  properties:
    properties:
      machineType: {{ machine }}
      tags:
        items:
        - app-server
      disks:
      - deviceName: boot
        type: PERSISTENT
        boot: true
        autoDelete: true
        initializeParams:
          sourceImage: {{ image }}
      networkInterfaces:
      - network: {{ network }}
        subnetwork: {{ subnet }}
        accessConfigs:
        - name: External NAT
          type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
      serviceAccounts:
      - email: {{ sa }}
        scopes:
        - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/devstorage.read_write
        - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/sqlservice.admin
        - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/logging.write
        - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/monitoring.write
      metadata:
        items:
        - key: startup-script
          value: |
{{ startup|indent(12, true) }}

- name: {{ mig }}
  type: compute.v1.instanceGroupManager
  properties:
    zone: {{ zone }}
    baseInstanceName: {{ base }}
    targetSize: {{ target }}
    instanceTemplate: $(ref.{{ tpl }}.selfLink)

outputs:
- name: instanceGroupSelfLink
  value: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/{{ env["project"] }}/zones/{{ zone }}/instanceGroups/{{ mig }}

---
{% set region = properties["region"] %}
{% set backendPort = properties["backendPort"] %}
{% set hcPort = properties["healthCheckPort"] %}
{% set hcPath = properties["healthCheckPath"] %}
{% set ig = properties["instanceGroupSelfLink"] %}

resources:
- name: app-health-check
  type: compute.v1.healthCheck
  properties:
    type: HTTP
    httpHealthCheck:
      port: {{ hcPort }}
      requestPath: {{ hcPath }}
    checkIntervalSec: 10
    timeoutSec: 5
    healthyThreshold: 2
    unhealthyThreshold: 3

- name: app-backend-service
  type: compute.v1.backendService
  properties:
    loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL
    protocol: HTTP
    portName: http
    timeoutSec: 30
    healthChecks:
    - $(ref.app-health-check.selfLink)
    backends:
    - group: {{ ig }}

- name: app-url-map
  type: compute.v1.urlMap
  properties:
    defaultService: $(ref.app-backend-service.selfLink)

- name: app-http-proxy
  type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
  properties:
    urlMap: $(ref.app-url-map.selfLink)

- name: app-http-rule
  type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
  properties:
    target: $(ref.app-http-proxy.selfLink)
    portRange: "80"
    IPProtocol: TCP
    loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL

outputs:
- name: ipAddress
  value: $(ref.app-http-rule.IPAddress)
